title: pelargonium × difforme
intro: Pelargonium × difforme, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family, primarily grown for its medicinal and ornamental purposes. The plant is known for its essential oil, which contains compounds like rosmarinic acid, responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Cape Geranium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, colds, and sore throats. Cape Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory and digestive problems.
